Legend of the Realms

Embark on an epic adventure through dungeons and realms! Explore the overworld, delve into dungeons to find keys and special items, solve puzzles with switches and blocks, and defeat powerful bosses. Master combat with your sword and shield, discover new abilities like the Dash Boots and Hookshot, and switch between Light and Dark realms to unlock new paths. Your goal: collect all dungeon treasures and defeat the final boss to restore peace to the land!

Arrow Keys: Move in eight directions | Z: Swing sword / Charge and release for Spin Attack | Space: Use equipped item (Hookshot, Bomb, Bow, etc.) | Shift: Dash (when Dash Boots acquired) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to title screen

Legend of the Realms

Embark on an epic adventure through dungeons and realms! Explore the overworld, delve into dungeons to find keys and special items, solve puzzles with switches and blocks, and defeat powerful bosses. Master combat with your sword and shield, discover new abilities like the Dash Boots and Hookshot, and switch between Light and Dark realms to unlock new paths. Your goal: collect all dungeon treasures and defeat the final boss to restore peace to the land!

Arrow Keys: Move in eight directions | Z: Swing sword / Charge and release for Spin Attack | Space: Use equipped item (Hookshot, Bomb, Bow, etc.) | Shift: Dash (when Dash Boots acquired) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to title screen
